Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alchemist's Guild]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Alchemist's Guild designed redshot ammunition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Some alchemists in the Guild try to duplicate the Gray Island's mist in labs but fail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Guild of Alchemists performs experiments on inmates in Imperial prisons.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Fletcher has Alchemist’s Guild contracts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Kanatalia is associated with the Alchemist’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Meia is enforced by the power of the Alchemist’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Guild of Alchemists is located in Kanatalia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Guild of Alchemists carries out assignments from the Emperor.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — The Guild of Alchemists marks up their potions by eighty percent.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Alchemist's Guild possesses obscene wealth.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Petal is more talented than the Alchemist’s Guild recognized.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Alchemists of the Alchemist’s Guild often wear a uniform consisting of bulging glass goggles, a thick apron, and gloves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — A member of the Alchemist’s Guild is working on Baldezar Kern's wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Alchemist's Guild is secretly dealing with the Magisters.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Head of the Alchemist’s Guild relies on powerful stimulants known to alchemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Alchemist’s Guild crafts smoke used to loosen tongues.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
